name: Stickman Hook Rescue
description: We all know the stickman as an excellent warrior, a good friend and a generally positive character, which in itself already allows him to become a superhero. Well, why not, here, for example, he is impressed by the spider-man, perhaps the stickman would have come out no worse than a spider?
instructions: Tap to hook and make incredible jumps Avoid every obstacle that stands in your way Can you execute all these acrobatic tricks in a row like a boss
tags: Adventure, Arcade, Hypercasual, Spiderman, Stickman, Super, Superhero
